_comment: Back-step maneuver demo: zoom in on the lone Spearmen (seed 12345, ~407,300, facing south toward the enemy), select it, then right-click a short step straight behind it. The click target (407, 270) is a ~30-unit move directly into the rear sector, comfortably under UnitManeuver.SIDESTEP_MAX_DISTANCE (40.0), so the regiment BACK-STEPS -- it shuffles backward at a walk while holding its south-facing line, instead of about-facing (conversio) in place and marching forward facing the new spot. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd. World coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
